equations.equation: Z~Categorical(tau_e); X0~Categorical(p0); A_previous~train marginal; M_previous=1; Delta=0; alive=1; t=0
A_current~pi_beta(observable context bin,A_previous); exploratory is supported-uniform; concentrated adds frozen previous-action mass

equations.dependencies: observed history only; no X,Z,future observation,or simulator parameter access

equations.equation: +1 survival proxy or -1 terminal event, emitted once when terminate

terminal_timing: terminal reward emitted exactly once at first termination; horizon 11 forced termination

theoretical_bounds.normalization: fixed task-specific reward contract; raw returns not pooled
